PaginationResponse.description: Contains information about the pagination used.

ActiveSessionTimes.description: List of available start times for active sessions. Note the following: * The times returned represent possibilities for scheduling a session, not necessarily currently scheduled sessions. * The response includes either all schedule types or those filtered by supplying `ScheduleType` or `SessionTypeIds`. * Each session has an associated schedule type, but when you supply `SessionTypeIds`, they may map to one or more of the schedule types.
